workstreams.title: Track H4 — apps/accounts/ Next.js host for accounts.paperworklabs.com
workstreams.notes: apps/accounts/ Next.js scaffold MERGED (PR #353) + Vercel project 'accounts' (prj_DidXdCyMrnrigX5us9Sv4noysUil) created via API + git-linked to paperwork-labs/paperwork (root=apps/accounts) + accounts.paperworklabs.com domain added (auto-verified via apex ownership) + Cloudflare CNAME live. Clerk env vars copied studio→accounts (production + preview + development) and NEXT_PUBLIC_CLERK_DOMAIN + NEXT_PUBLIC_CLERK_IS_SATELLITE=false set. First production build deployed BEFORE env vars were wired — currently HTTP 500 (MIDDLEWARE_INVOCATION_FAILED). Resolves on next deploy after Vercel daily quota resets ~2026-04-29 21:00 UTC, OR Pro upgrade. WS-34 (pre-deploy guard, PR #365) prevents this class of failure going forward.

workstreams.title: Vercel auto-promote unblocked (jq norm/0 bug fixed)
workstreams.notes: def norm(s) was being invoked as ($HEAD|norm) which jq parses as norm/0 (undefined). Every push to main since the regex script was last edited had been silently failing all promote legs since 2026-04-24. PR #319 fixed by switching to norm($HEAD) / norm($MERGE). Studio production aliased to main HEAD on 2026-04-28; distill build re-triggered; launchfree/filefree/trinkets queued for next path-relevant PR.

workstreams.title: Brain pre-deploy guard (quota + env-var pre-flight before Vercel deploy)
workstreams.notes: Closes the gap left by Q1–Q3 quota monitors (WS-29–31) which OBSERVE but don't ENFORCE. Today we hit Vercel 100/day Hobby cap mid-session AND deployed accounts.paperworklabs.com BEFORE Clerk env vars were set (→ HTTP 500 MIDDLEWARE_INVOCATION_FAILED). New scripts/check_pre_deploy.py (stdlib-only) refuses to deploy if (a) Brain /admin/vercel-quota reports remaining < threshold OR (b) any required env var per apis/brain/data/required_env_vars.yaml is missing on the target environment. Wired into vercel-cutover-axiomfolio.yml as a pre-step. PR #365 open.
